title: Aurora Cannabis (TSX:ACB) Stock Price & Overview
text: Aurora Cannabis Inc trading overview provides real-time market data and fundamental metrics for investors. Company profile: Aurora Cannabis Inc. trades on NASDAQ and Toronto Stock Exchange under ticker ACB. Headquarters in Edmonton, Canada. Leading global medical cannabis company with presence across Canada, Australia, Germany, Poland, and UK. Key financials: FY2025 revenue $343 million (up 27% YoY). Record global medical cannabis revenue $244.4 million (up 39% YoY). Record adjusted EBITDA $49.7 million (261% YoY growth). Positive free cash flow $9.9 million. Cash position $185+ million with debt-free cannabis operations. Business segments: Medical cannabis (primary focus): 77-90% of revenue, highest margins (69-74%). Consumer cannabis (being de-emphasized): declining trend as company prioritizes medical. Plant propagation (Bevo): contributing minimal EBITDA. Market position: Number 2 in Australia. Strong positions in Germany, Poland, UK. Market leadership in Canadian medical insurance segment. Stock metrics: Current price around $4-5 USD range. 52-week range reflecting volatility typical of cannabis sector. Trading volume typically higher during earnings announcements and regulatory news. Technical analysis: Support and resistance levels tracked by technical analysts. Momentum indicators reflecting investor sentiment on medical cannabis opportunities.
